summary: Tested /api/auth/me endpoint, business settings API for SKU configuration, and Settings wizard flow. Backend APIs working correctly. Frontend Settings wizard UI components present and functional.

integration_issues.issue: User header reverts to 'User SALES_STAFF' after page navigation despite /api/auth/me returning correct 'admin' role. The fix added to loadUser() calls /api/auth/me but state may be overwritten elsewhere.

backend_auth_me_endpoint.details: GET /api/auth/me correctly returns user data from database with role='admin' for admin@fmcg.com

backend_business_settings.details: GET /api/business/settings returns SKU settings (sku_format, sku_prefix, sku_digits, sku_separator). PUT updates work correctly.

settings_simple_view.details: Settings page shows Simple View by default with 'Essential Settings' section containing Business Profile, Currency & Tax, Staff & Access cards

settings_wizard_modal.details: Setup wizard modal displays with 'Welcome to Soko!' message, progress dots (4 steps), and 'Let's Go!' button

setup_progress_card.details: 'Complete Your Setup' progress card shows 0/3 completion with 'Continue Setup' button

advanced_settings_toggle.details: 'Advanced Settings' collapsible section present below Essential Settings cards

action_items: Investigate session persistence issue: User header shows 'SALES_STAFF' after navigation despite /api/auth/me returning correct role. May need to check if state is being overwritten in multiple places.
Verify BulkProductImportModal useEffect is fetching SKU settings from businessSettingsApi.get() on modal open
critical_code_review_comments: authStore.ts loadUser() correctly validates token with /api/auth/me and updates user state with fresh data
SimpleSettingsView.tsx has proper wizard flow with 4 steps: Welcome, Business Information, Currency Settings, Completion
BulkProductImportModal.tsx lines 82-110 correctly fetch SKU settings from businessSettingsApi.get() when modal opens
The session issue may be caused by AsyncStorage cached data being read before /api/auth/me response arrives

success_rate.frontend: 85% - Settings UI components work, session display issue persists

context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend /api/auth/me endpoint works correctly. Settings wizard shows 4 steps with proper UI. Session persistence issue: after page navigation, the user header reverts to 'User SALES_STAFF'. This may be a race condition where cached AsyncStorage data is displayed before the /api/auth/me validation completes. The BulkProductImportModal has useEffect to load SKU settings but couldn't fully test due to auth issues on products page.
